allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)`nLength: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes`nHas root div: $\($r.Content -match 'id=.root.'\)`nHas main script: $\($r.Content -match 'src/main.jsx'\)" } catch { "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/main.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "main.jsx Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "main.jsx error: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/App.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "App.jsx Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "App.jsx error: $_" })

PowerShell($comps = @\('Hero','About','Skills','Experience','Achievements','Certifications','Education','Contact','Footer','Navbar','AnimatedBackground','CustomCursor','ScrollProgress','GlowCard','SectionHeading'\); foreach \($c in $comps\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/components/$c.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "$c`: OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { "$c`: FAIL — $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/components/CustomCursor.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "FAIL $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Page OK $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Page FAIL $_" })

PowerShell($comps = @\('TechStack','MatrixHover','RevealImage','CustomCursor','About','Education','Certifications'\); foreach \($c in $comps\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/components/$c.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "$c`: OK" } catch { "$c`: FAIL — $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/App.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "App: OK" } catch { "App: FAIL" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/App.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "App: OK" } catch { "App: FAIL — $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/components/MatrixHover.jsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Matrix: OK" } catch { "Matrix: FAIL — $_" })
PowerShell(python -c "import fitz; print\('pymupdf', fitz.__doc__[:30]\)" 2>&1; python -c "import pdf2image; print\('pdf2image OK'\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -m pip install --quiet pymupdf; python -c "import fitz; print\('pymupdf', fitz.__version__\)")
